title: Sensory Translator
description: Sensory Translator is a 5-channel CV and video-rate signal acquisition stage: a bridge between the outside world and your 1V patch, built for control voltages, audio, and light-to-voltage work without treating the module as a generic “interface” box. Input ranges, scaling, and patch ethics: Manual. Specs for hardware.
